Package com.rhlowery.acs.service

Interface CatalogService

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultCatalogService
public interface CatalogService
Orchestrates operations across multiple data catalog providers (e.g., Unity Catalog, AWS Glue). 
 
 @startuml
 interface CatalogService {
   +applyPolicy(catalogId, path, action, principal)
   +getEffectivePermissions(catalogId, path, principal)
   +getNodes(catalogId, path)
   +getRequiredApprovers(catalogId, path)
 }
 CatalogService "1" o-- "0..*" CatalogProvider : orchestrates
 @enduml

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyPolicy(String catalogId, String path, String action, String principal)
    Applies a security policy to a specific resource path within a catalog.
    void
    clear()
    Resets all provider states (primarily for testing).
    String
    getEffectivePermissions(String catalogId, String path, String principal)
    Retrieves the effective permissions for a principal on a specific resource.
    List<CatalogNode>
    getNodes(String catalogId, String path)
    Retrieves child nodes for a given path in a specific catalog.
    List<CatalogRegistration>
    getProviderRegistrations()
    Returns metadata about all registered providers.
    List<String>
    getRequiredApprovers(String catalogId, String path)
    Recursively resolves the required approver groups for a given resource path by traversing up the catalog hierarchy.
    List<String>
    listProviders()
    Lists all registered catalog providers and their capabilities.
    void
    registerProvider(CatalogProvider provider)
    Dynamically registers a new catalog provider.
    boolean
    verifyPolicy(String catalogId, String path, String expectedAction, String principal)
    Verifies if a specific policy is correctly applied at the provider level.

  • Method Details

    • applyPolicy

      void applyPolicy(String catalogId, String path, String action, String principal)
      Applies a security policy to a specific resource path within a catalog.
      Parameters:
      catalogId - Unique identifier of the catalog
      path - The resource path (e.g., catalog.schema.table)
      action - The privilege to grant (e.g., SELECT, MODIFY)
      principal - The identity receiving the privilege

    • getEffectivePermissions

      String getEffectivePermissions(String catalogId, String path, String principal)
      Retrieves the effective permissions for a principal on a specific resource.
      Parameters:
      catalogId - Unique identifier of the catalog
      path - The resource path
      principal - The user or group identity
      Returns:
      The highest effective permission string

    • listProviders

      List<String> listProviders()
      Lists all registered catalog providers and their capabilities.
      Returns:
      A list of provider description strings

    • verifyPolicy

      boolean verifyPolicy(String catalogId, String path, String expectedAction, String principal)
      Verifies if a specific policy is correctly applied at the provider level. Used for drift detection.
      Parameters:
      catalogId - Unique identifier of the catalog
      path - The resource path
      expectedAction - The expected privilege
      principal - The identity to check
      Returns:
      true if the policy is correctly applied, false otherwise

    • getNodes

      List<CatalogNode> getNodes(String catalogId, String path)
      Retrieves child nodes for a given path in a specific catalog.
      Parameters:
      catalogId - Unique identifier of the catalog
      path - The parent path
      Returns:
      List of child CatalogNode objects

    • getProviderRegistrations

      List<CatalogRegistration> getProviderRegistrations()
      Returns metadata about all registered providers.
      Returns:
      List of CatalogRegistration DTOs

    • registerProvider

      void registerProvider(CatalogProvider provider)
      Dynamically registers a new catalog provider.
      Parameters:
      provider - The provider implementation to register

    • getRequiredApprovers

      List<String> getRequiredApprovers(String catalogId, String path)
      Recursively resolves the required approver groups for a given resource path by traversing up the catalog hierarchy.
      Parameters:
      catalogId - Unique identifier of the catalog
      path - The resource path
      Returns:
      List of group IDs that must approve access

    • clear

      void clear()
      Resets all provider states (primarily for testing).
